claim: Production ML systems must handle continuously evolving data and run non-stop at minimum cost while maintaining maximum performance.
actionable: When designing ML systems for production, prioritize cost efficiency, reliability, and ability to adapt to changing data distributions.
source_title: Machine Learning in Production, now available at DeepLearning.AI

claim: Machine learning engineering for production requires knowledge of tools, techniques, and practices beyond standard ML modeling and training.
actionable: Learn production ML techniques like data augmentation, experiment tracking, error analysis, and deployment strategies beyond model training.
source_title: Machine Learning in Production, now available at DeepLearning.AI

claim: Production ML requires strategies for addressing concept drift and establishing model baselines for continuous improvement.
actionable: Implement baseline models and monitor for concept drift in production; use error analysis to identify and address data distribution changes.
source_title: Machine Learning in Production, now available at DeepLearning.AI
